summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KHAYA Real Estate app. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly including tower selector, floor selector, floor plan overlays, unit modal with Sales Plan calculations, status dropdown, and filters.

backend: GET /api/ returns API info with KHAYA branding
GET /api/towers returns 3 towers (Torre E, Torre F, Torre G)
Tower structure includes name, floors (14), apartments (10), delivery
Units have correct statuses (Disponible, Vendido, Bloqueado, Reservado)
Unit structure includes all required fields (id, code, tower, floor, price, etc.)
POST /api/sync triggers Google Sheets re-sync successfully
frontend: Emergent badge is hidden (CSS override working)
Tower selector shows 3 towers (E, F, G)
Tower switching works (click Torre F, G, E)
Floor plan container visible with 10 unit overlays per floor
Unit modal opens when clicking Disponible apartment
Sales Plan modal shows price calculations (Prima, Reserva, etc.)
Status dropdown in modal shows all 4 options
Status can be changed via dropdown and persists
Vendido apartments have X overlay and cursor: not-allowed
Vendido apartments do NOT open modal when clicked
Filters panel visible with view, status, type, price range
Color-coded overlays: Green=Disponible, Orange=Vendido, Gray=Bloqueado, Yellow=Reservado

seed_data_creation: Data synced from Google Sheets - 417 units across 3 towers
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs and frontend features are working correctly. The app syncs data from a public Google Sheet (417 units across 3 towers). Manual status overrides are persisted in MongoDB. The floor plan uses percentage-based positioning for apartment overlays. Vendido apartments correctly show X overlay and are not clickable. The Emergent badge is hidden via CSS in index.html.
